title: vernonia congolensis subsp. vernonioides
intro: Vernonia congolensis subsp. vernonioides, also known as Congo lettermose, is a plant species within the daisy family (Asteraceae) that is native to tropical Africa. The plant has been found to possess various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which make it useful in traditional medicine for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Vernonia congolensis subsp. vernonioides include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and dermatitis, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
